flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Loras College fell 27% between 2021 and 2024 (60.5% → 43.9%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Loras College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.3k → $39.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Loras College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.3k → $39.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Loras College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2k → 1.1k).
